news.headline: Chris Brummer emphasizes fintech's need to engage with DC for support as regulations evolve.
Syniverse appoints William B. Petersen as EVP and CLO to lead global legal team, reporting to CEO Andrew Davies.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, Syniverse, known as "the world's most connected company®," has named William B. Petersen as the Executive Vice President and Chief Legal Officer (CLO). He will oversee the global legal team, emphasizing compliance, contract negotiations, risk management, and corporate governance. Petersen will report to Syniverse's CEO, Andrew Davies. With more than 35 years of experience, Petersen will bring significant expertise to the role.

news.headline: Dow Jones dives, Trump stock triples, Tesla falls with earnings. Warren Buffett warns investors. Elon Musk due.
news.summary: Today, the stock market experienced a decline as the Dow Jones fell. Warren Buffett advised caution to investors amidst this situation. A stock linked to Donald Trump saw a significant increase in value, tripling its previous worth and reaching a crucial threshold. Additionally, Tesla is set to release its earnings soon, prompting fluctuations in its stock price. This update was reported live and covered by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Nate Silver predicts Trump victory in election, but says Kamala Harris could also outperform polls, with $3 million bet on her.
news.summary: Nate Silver, former FiveThirtyEight editor-in-chief, presented two different views on the presidential race, indicating that Kamala Harris and Donald Trump could surpass their current poll numbers. In an opinion piece for the New York Times, Silver leaned towards a gut feeling of Trump winning but advised against trusting his intuition. He further explained in a blog post that a 3-point polling error could result in one candidate winning all seven crucial swing states. Based on Silver's simulations, Trump winning all battleground states was the most common outcome at 24%, followed by Harris sweeping at 15%. Silver also rejected the concept of a "shy Trump voter." For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: European Energy A/S has finalized the tender offer for Existing Bonds: 2021/2025 and 2022/2026 and priced New Green Bonds. Release restricted in the US.
news.summary: This information is not to be released, published, or distributed in the United States, or to any individual in any jurisdiction where such actions are restricted by applicable laws or regulations.

news.headline: Bel Fuse Inc. reported Q3-24 with $123.6M sales, 36.1% margin, $8.1M earnings, and Q4-24 estimated sales of $117-$125M with 34-36% margin. Acquisition of Enercon to introduce new customers. Operational initiatives with cost-saving goals. Focus on growth for 2025. Conference call scheduled for further discussion. Non-GAAP financial measures utilized. For more information, visit the company website.
news.summary: Bel Fuse Inc. announced their preliminary financial results for Q3 of 2024. They reported net sales of $123.6 million, with a gross profit margin of 36.1%, up from 35.0% in Q3-23. Net earnings were $8.1 million compared to $19.4 million in Q3-23. Adjusted EBITDA was $20.6 million, down from $29.9 million in Q3-23. Bel repurchased 26,647 shares of stock at a cost of $1.9 million in Q3-24. The company expects Q4-24 net sales between $117 and $125 million, with gross margins of 34-36%. They also announced an acquisition of Enercon and consolidation of fuse manufacturing in China for cost savings. The CFO noted positive trends in bookings for Sept and Oct, especially in networking and industrial markets. The company will host a conference call on Oct 24 to discuss these results.

news.headline: Rackspace Technology will announce Q3 2024 earnings on Nov 12, 2024, after market close. Conference call at 5:00 PM ET.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, Rackspace Technology®, a top hybrid, multicloud, and AI solutions firm traded on NASDAQ under the symbol RXT, revealed plans to disclose its third quarter 2024 financial results after market closure on Tuesday, November 12, 2024. The CEO, Amar Maletira, and CFO, Mark Marino, will lead a conference call at 5:00 PM ET on the release day to delve into the company's financial performance.

news.headline: Northeast Indiana Bancorp, Inc. reports $1.0 million net income in Q3 2024 ($0.43/share).
news.summary: Northeast Indiana Bancorp, Inc., headquartered in Huntington, Indiana, reported its financial results for the third quarter ending September 30, 2024. The parent company of First Federal Savings Bank disclosed a net income of $1.0 million, translating to $0.43 per diluted common share. This marks a significant improvement in earnings compared to the previous period.

news.headline: TechnipFMC authorizes $0.05 quarterly dividend per share, payable Dec 4, 2024 to shareholders, and up to $1 billion share repurchase program.
news.summary: TechnipFMC plc (NYSE: FTI) has recently declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.05 per share. Shareholders of record by November 19, 2024, on the New York Stock Exchange will receive the dividend on December 4, 2024. The Board also approved share repurchases of up to $1 billion, supplementing the current program, as part of their strategy.

news.headline: ICL to release Q3 2024 results on Nov 11, followed by earnings call with CEO and CFO at different time zones.
news.summary: Israeli-based company ICL is set to unveil its third quarter 2024 financial results before the TASE market opens on Monday, November 11, 2024. The company's President and CEO, Raviv Zoller, along with CFO Aviram Lahav, will conduct a conference call at 8:30 a.m. NY time on the same day to review the results, share business insights, and address inquiries. The call will take place at 1:30 p.m. in London and 3:30 p.m. in Tel Aviv. ICL, listed on NYSE as ICL and TASE as ICL, is a prominent global specialty minerals firm.

news.headline: Juniata Valley Financial Corp. reports Q3 net income $1.6M (down from $1.8M in 2023) and 9-month net income $4.7M (from $4.9M in 2023).
news.summary: Juniata Valley Financial Corp. (OTCQX:JUVF) based in Mifflintown, PA, reported its financial results for the third quarter of 2024, revealing a net income of $1.6 million, a decline from $1.8 million in the same period in 2023. Earnings per share also saw a decrease, with $0.33 in the third quarter of 2024 compared to $0.36 in the third quarter of 2023. For the nine months ending September 30, 2024, net income stood at $4.7 million, down from $4.9 million in the same period in 2023. Earnings per share for the nine months ending September 30, 2024 were $0.95, a decrease from $0.98 in the nine months ending September 30, 2023.

news.headline: CACI's strong Q1 fiscal results show 11% revenue growth, leading to a raise in fiscal year guidance. #CACIInc
news.summary: RESTON, Va.--CACI International Inc reported its fiscal first-quarter results for the period ending September 30, 2024. The company, a key supplier of expertise and technology to government clients, revealed a significant 11% increase in revenue during the quarter. Alongside robust profitability and cash flow figures, CACI also boasted substantial awards and backlog numbers. This success underscores the company's adaptable and strategic approach to capital allocation, showcasing its commitment to growth and innovation.

news.headline: WesBanco reports strong Q3 2024 results: 12.1% deposit growth and 6.3% loan growth. Company's net income released.

WesBanco, trading on Nasdaq under the symbol WSBC, unveiled these results alongside their latest net income figures.

news.headline: Stewart reports Q3 2024: Total revenues $667.9M ($663.2M adjusted), net income $30.1M ($33.1M adjusted).
news.summary: The company reported total revenues of $667.9 million, which is an increase from $601.7 million in the previous year. After adjustments, the total revenues were $663.2 million compared to $603.7 million in the prior year quarter. Net income for the current quarter was $30.1 million, a significant rise from the $14.0 million reported in the previous year. When adjusted, the net income was $33.1 million in the current quarter compared to $23.9 million in the prior year.

news.headline: HANYC praises NYC Council for passing Safe Hotels Act exempting small hotels from extra costs; aimed at creating a fair regulatory environment.
news.summary: The Hotel Association of New York City (HANYC) has released a statement on the passage of Intro 991, named the “Safe Hotels Act,” by the New York City Council. Vijay Dandapani, the President and CEO of HANYC, stated that after significant negotiations and revisions, the legislation has been approved. The act exempts small hotels from high expenses and eliminates arbitrary licensing regulations for all hotels. This move is aimed at establishing fair and standardized regulations within the industry.

news.headline: ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. reports Q3 results and financial position as of Sept. 30, 2024. (Total numbers not provided)
news.summary: In Vero Beach, Florida, on October 23, 2024, ARMOUR Residential REIT, Inc. (NYSE: ARR and ARR PRC) revealed its unaudited Q3 outcomes and financial status as of September 30, 2024.

news.headline: Eagle Bancorp, Inc. reports Q3 2024 results: Book value per share up by $1.86, Common Equity Tier 1 Capital at 14.5%, Tier 1 Capital at 10.9%.
news.summary: Eagle has increased its book value per share by $1.86. The Common Equity Tier 1 Capital's leverage ratio now stands at 14.5%, while the Tier 1 Capital leverage ratio is at 10.9%.

news.headline: Onity Group Inc. announces pricing of $500 million senior notes due 2029 at 9.875%, to close on November 6, 2024.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, in West Palm Beach, Florida, Onity Group Inc. made an announcement regarding PHH Escrow Issuer LLC. A total of $500 million aggregate principal amount of 9.875% Senior Notes due 2029 have been priced by Escrow Issuer, a subsidiary of PHH Corporation. Investors will be purchasing the Notes at 99.556% of the principal amount. The closing of the issuance and sale of the Notes is anticipated to occur on November 6, 2024, pending customary closing conditions.

news.headline: Horizon Bancorp, Inc. reports Q3 2024 EPS of $0.41, profit improvement, and accretive balance sheet initiatives.
news.summary: Horizon Bancorp, Inc. revealed its unaudited financial performance for the third quarter of 2024. The results cover the three-month period ending September 30, 2024. Additionally, the company also shared its financial outcomes for the first nine months of the same fiscal year.

news.headline: HCI Group takes on 42,000 policies from Citizens, equating to $200M in premium. Acquisition boosts company's insurance operations.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, in Tampa, Florida, HCI Group, Inc. (NYSE: HCI), a diverse holding company, revealed that its insurance subsidiaries have taken on more than 42,000 policies from Citizens Property Insurance Corporation, the state-backed insurer in Florida. These policies account for around $200 million in in-force premiums.HCI Group, Inc. operates in various sectors including homeowners insurance, information technology services, real estate, and reinsurance.

The rescheduled date for the release has been set for October 23, 2024. NN, Inc. is listed on the NASDAQ exchange under the ticker symbol NNBR.

news.headline: Celestica beats Q3 2024 revenue and non-IFRS adjusted EPS, raises 2024 full-year outlook and provides 2025 forecast.
news.summary: In the third quarter of 2024, revenue and non-IFRS adjusted EPS surpassed the upper limits of the guidance ranges. As a result, the full-year outlook for 2024 has been increased, and the company has also supplied an outlook for 2025. This positive performance indicates a strong financial year for the company, with promising growth prospects for the upcoming years.

news.headline: Univest Financial Corp Q3 2024 earnings: $18.6M, EPS $0.63 vs. $17.0M, EPS $0.58 in Q3 2023.
news.summary: Univest Financial Corporation, based in SOUDERTON, Pennsylvania, revealed its latest financial results on Oct. 23, 2024. The parent company of Univest Bank and Trust Co. reported a net income of $18.6 million for the quarter ending on September 30, 2024, translating to $0.63 diluted earnings per share. This marks an increase from the same period in 2023, where net income was $17.0 million, with $0.58 diluted earnings per share. Univest Financial Corporation also operates insurance, investments, and equipment financing subsidiaries.

news.headline: ESCO Technologies (NYSE:ESE) will report Q4 financial results on Nov 14, 2024, followed by conference call.

news.summary: A housing investment firm, Greystone Housing Impact Investors LP (NYSE: GHI), based in Omaha, Nebraska, revealed plans to hold an investor conference call on November 6, 2024, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time. The purpose of the call is to review the Partnership's performance in the Third Quarter of 2024.

news.headline: Essential Properties posts strong Q3 results with $307.6 million invested in 57 properties, $17.0 million net proceeds from 9 dispositions.
news.summary: Essential Properties Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: EPRT) revealed its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024. During this period, the company made significant investments totaling $307.6 million across 57 properties, with an average cash cap rate of 8.1%. Additionally, they successfully disposed of 9 properties, generating net proceeds of $17.0 million. These numbers indicate a substantial increase in investments compared to the same quarter in 2023.
